title: [W4] AT — 建立基底專案骨架 (sln + 4 csproj + DI + Serilog)
instruction:
依 03_architecture/solution_layout.md 建立可運行的 .NET 8 MVC 基底骨架。**不含業務邏輯**,只要骨架 + 可 dotnet build + dotnet run 起服務 (預期返回 hello world 或空白首頁)。

[Worktree] 直接在 main branch 上做 (此卡是基底,不分支)
[輸出路徑] projects/eztravel.community/04_src/eztravel.Community/

[步驟]
1. cd projects/eztravel.community/04_src
2. mkdir -p eztravel.Community && cd eztravel.Community
3. dotnet new sln -n eztravel.Community
4. dotnet new mvc -n eztravel.Community.Web -f net8.0
5. dotnet new classlib -n eztravel.Community.Core -f net8.0
6. dotnet new classlib -n eztravel.Community.Infrastructure -f net8.0
7. dotnet new xunit -n eztravel.Community.Tests -f net8.0
8. dotnet sln add **/*.csproj
9. 設專案參考:
   - Web → Core + Infrastructure
   - Infrastructure → Core
   - Tests → Web + Core + Infrastructure
10. 安裝 nuget:
    - Web: Serilog.AspNetCore + Serilog.Formatting.Compact
    - Infrastructure: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore + Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL + Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.EntityFrameworkCore + Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design
    - Tests: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing + Testcontainers + Testcontainers.PostgreSql + Moq + FluentAssertions
11. Program.cs 配置 Serilog stdout JSON (對齊 memory project_dotnet_gcp_serilog_stdout):
    ```csharp
    Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()
        .WriteTo.Console(new Serilog.Formatting.Compact.RenderedCompactJsonFormatter())
        .Enrich.FromLogContext()
        .CreateLogger();
    builder.Host.UseSerilog();
    ```
12. 加 /health endpoint (簡單回 OK)
13. appsettings.json + appsettings.Development.json (PostgreSQL connection string placeholder)
14. dotnet build 成功 + dotnet run 起得來 + curl /health 回 OK
15. git add . && git -c user.email=admin@ai.factory commit -m "[W4-AT-2] baseline .NET 8 MVC skeleton + Serilog + Identity scaffold"

[goal_state]
dotnet build 0 error + dotnet run 啟動成功 + /health 200 + Identity + EF Core + Serilog 套件已裝

[verification]
- ls 04_src/eztravel.Community/eztravel.Community.{Web,Core,Infrastructure,Tests}.csproj 全存在
- cd 04_src/eztravel.Community && dotnet build 退出碼 0
- dotnet run & sleep 3 && curl localhost:5000/health 回 OK

[out_of_scope]
- 業務 controller/view (W4-PG-2/3/4 負責)
- EF Core entity 與 migration (W4-PG-1 負責)
- 完整測試 (W4-PG-6 負責)

[escalation_on_block]
- dotnet build fail → 修依賴版本後 commit;不擋
- dotnet run port conflict → 換 port (5001) 不擋

[完工] [TASK_DONE] + dotnet build 輸出 + dotnet run 啟動訊息 + commit_sha
[紀律] 中文 + 全形標點 + 不寫 WHAT 註解
objective: 建立可運行的 .NET 8 MVC 基底骨架，讓 W4-PG-* 直接接續開發業務邏輯。
goal_state: 04_src/eztravel.Community/ 含 4 csproj + sln + Serilog + Identity scaffold + EF Core，dotnet build 0 error + dotnet run 起 /health 200。
escalation_on_block: dotnet build fail 修依賴不擋
execution_log: dotnet build → 0 Error / dotnet run → http://localhost:5150 / GET /health → HTTP 200 OK
